message:
feat: Enhance CLI commands with improved output and filtering

Improve CLI command implementations:

- Refine blocked command output formatting
- Improve count command with extended statistics
- Enhance create command with additional options
- Extend list command filtering capabilities
- Improve search command with better result presentation
- Enhance stats command with detailed metrics
- Minor sync command improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
